title: Pre-Existing Test Fixes

fixes.root_cause: Test asserted 'Orchestration ONLY' and 'NEVER include implementation' which exist in the agent protocol's phase1_step4 block, but job_type=orchestrator triggers an early return to _generate_orchestrator_protocol (0830) which uses a completely different 3-phase coordination template.
fixes.fix: Updated assertions to match actual orchestrator protocol output: 'Orchestrator Coordination Protocol (3 Phases)' and 'ORCHESTRATOR CONSTRAINTS'.

fixes.root_cause: Test asserted mock call to broadcast_job_status_change but production code (message_service.py:583) calls broadcast_job_status_update.
fixes.fix: Changed mock assertion from broadcast_job_status_change to broadcast_job_status_update.

fixes.root_cause: Originally reported as mocking non-existent _get_memory_entries and _get_user_settings, but these were already fixed in prior 0840d work on this branch (tests already use _get_user_configs).
fixes.fix: No action needed — all 35 tuning service tests pass.

summary: Fixed 2 pre-existing test failures. test_orchestrator_todowrite_scoped_to_coordination had stale assertions from before the 0830 orchestrator protocol fork. test_auto_block_fires_websocket_event referenced a renamed WebSocket method. The tuning service tests were already corrected in earlier 0840d work. Full suite: 1748 passed, 8 other failures (integration/shutdown tests unrelated to this handover).
